items.title: Marc Lore says that AI will soon enable anyone open a restaurant

items.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
items.description: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.
